specific_question: What were the unit sales and conversion rates in Q3 of 2024 for delivering personalized email content as opposed to generic materials over various timeframes?
answer: According to CRM data, leads receiving personalized emails with vehicle configuration recommendations within 10 days of the initial inquiry convert at 9.7%, while those receiving generic content convert at 5.3%, which totals up to 234 and 167 units, respectively, across the third quarter of 2024.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
